rows.label: tev024501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Joy about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Joy if she's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Joy about the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Joy about damage
suffered in the attack.

rows.label: tev024501_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Joy if she's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Joy about the people of NLA.

rows.label: tev024501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Joy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0001
rows.name:
I work as a counselor. ...Hmm? You're asking
why I'm not working now? On the contrary,
I'm taking one of my own treatments![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Now that the dust has settled from our crash
landing, people are becoming more psychologically
vulnerable to stress-related flashbacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Personally, I advise my clients
to come here and play sports
rather than popping pills.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sports are a wonderful treatment.
Sweating together deepens bonds and
washes the grime off our brains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0005
rows.name:
And if you still don't believe me, I'll
prove it by challenging you to a match![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0006
rows.name:
After our game, I know you'll look
just as refreshed as Charles does.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Even BLADEs have their movements
restricted until they acclimate
themselves to the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0009
rows.name:
After they've completed a couple of major
missions, however, they're considered a
full-fledged BLADE and can go wherever they please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Once you're that confident in
your own skills, why not set off
for some remote destination?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0011
rows.name:
As soon as you experience the true majesty of Mira's
landscape, you'll begin to fully appreciate the
magnitude of what BLADE is trying to accomplish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Have you seen how the Ma-non play? It's delightful!
They can experience the game in a way that we
who are constrained by the rules cannot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0021
rows.name:
They possess incredible technology, yet
speak and behave almost like children.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Perhaps within those habits lies the
secret to their technological prowess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0023
rows.name:
But when I suggested as much to Charles,
he just claimed that they're happy-go-lucky
and put an end to the conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0028
rows.name: I am truly glad the Ma-non came for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0029
rows.name:
Thanks to them, the civilian
population of NLA was spared from
having to see combat firsthand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0030
rows.name:
Unlike you BLADEs, we civilians
are unaccustomed to warfare. So
to have our own city attacked...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Needless to say, it has been a source of anxiety
that many people wish to discuss with me. And
naturally, it's an anxiety that I feel as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0032
rows.name:
If I didn't have sports to
clear my head and heart, I
don't know how I could go on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Have you heard the rumors of small islands
in the far reaches of Mira's ocean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0038
rows.name:
BLADEs have apparently found a number
of them in a variety of locations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0039
rows.name:
The image of an island at the end
of the sea inspires such exciting
memories of the Age of Discovery![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Lately, in my job as counselor, the
discussion topics that I've been dealing
with have changed a great deal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0046
rows.name:
People want to talk about their anxiety for the future.
That itself is nothing new, but the futures they see are
now far brighter that the ones they imagined previously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0047
rows.name:
My clients talk of marrying and starting a family, or
finding a career beyond BLADE—topics that are better
suited for this court than a counselor's office![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0048
rows.name:
I imagine returning to our fleshly bodies will dredge
up new anxieties. But for now, I hope we can take
some time to reflect upon our newfound peace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0049
rows.name:
I taught the rules of tennis to the
Orphean, Ton'barac. He absorbed them
and was ready to play right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0050
rows.name:
He's already a master of tennis tactics and theory.
If he could just commit some moves to muscle memory,
he could easily be the best player in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0051
rows.name:
The only issue is that he seems to
view tennis not as a sport, but as
some sort of human...ritual.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024501_MSG0052
rows.name: A ritual venting of stress, perhaps?[ST:wait ]
